caseContext.title: Case Context
caseContext.description: AI agent context information for this case. This shows what information is available to the AI assistant.
caseContext.regulationsDescription: German laws and regulations applicable to this case type.
caseContext.documentsDescription: Documents required for this case type with their validation requirements.
caseContext.foldersDescription: Folder structure and their expected contents for this case.
caseContext.issuesDescription: Common issues encountered in this case type and recommended solutions.

descriptions.integration_course: Application for participation in an integration course according to §43 AufenthG. This includes the language course (600 hours) and the orientation course (100 hours).

validationRules.age_verification: Applicant must be at least 18 years old or have parental consent if minor
validationRules.residence_status_check: Valid residence permit or ongoing asylum procedure required
validationRules.residence_eligibility_integration: Applicant must hold residence permit type eligible for integration course (§43 AufenthG)
validationRules.document_validity: All identity documents must be valid and not expired
validationRules.address_consistency: Address must be consistent across all documents
validationRules.name_consistency: Name spelling must match across all documents
validationRules.language_level_assessment: Current language level must be documented
validationRules.language_level_assessment_integration: If language certificate provided, verify CEFR level for integration course placement
validationRules.course_eligibility: Must meet eligibility criteria for integration course
validationRules.course_history_check: Previous integration course participation must be documented if applicable
validationRules.obligation_verification_integration: If obligated to attend integration course (§44 AufenthG), verify referral documentation
validationRules.translation_requirement: Foreign language documents require certified German translation
validationRules.photo_compliance: Passport photo must meet biometric standards

§43_AufenthG.title: Integration Course Entitlement
§43_AufenthG.summary: Defines who is entitled to participate in an integration course and the basic requirements.

§44_AufenthG.title: Integration Course Obligation
§44_AufenthG.summary: Defines when participation in an integration course can be mandatory.

§44a_AufenthG.title: Integration Course Procedure
§44a_AufenthG.summary: Regulates the procedure for admission to the integration course.

§45_AufenthG.title: Integration Program
§45_AufenthG.summary: Framework for integration programs beyond language courses.

IntV_§4.title: Course Structure
IntV_§4.summary: Defines the structure and content of integration courses.

IntV_§5.title: Language Course
IntV_§5.summary: 600 teaching units of German language instruction.

IntV_§6.title: Orientation Course
IntV_§6.summary: 100 teaching units covering German legal system, history, and culture.

IntV_§17.title: Final Test
IntV_§17.summary: Requirements for the German Test for Immigrants (DTZ).

IntV_§11.title: Cost Exemption
IntV_§11.summary: Regulates cost exemption for integration course participants receiving benefits.

IntV_§13.title: Special Courses
IntV_§13.summary: Establishes specialized integration courses including youth, parent/women, and intensive courses.

SGB_II_§3.title: Social Security Integration
SGB_II_§3.summary: Integration measures in the context of basic security benefits.

SGB_II_§44a.title: Integration Course Obligation (SGB II)
SGB_II_§44a.summary: Social Code provisions regarding integration course obligations for unemployment benefit recipients.

SGB_III_§45.title: Employment Agency Support
SGB_III_§45.summary: Support measures through the Federal Employment Agency.

birth_certificate.name: Birth Certificate
birth_certificate.description: Official birth certificate for identity verification.
birth_certificate.notes: Translation required if not in German.

passport.name: Passport
passport.notes: Copy of all relevant pages required.

residence_permit.name: Residence Permit
residence_permit.description: Current residence permit or proof of residence status.
residence_permit.notes: Must be valid for the duration of the course.

registration_certificate.name: Registration Certificate
registration_certificate.description: Official registration at current place of residence.
registration_certificate.notes: Must be current (not older than 3 months).

language_certificate.name: Language Certificate
language_certificate.description: Certificate of current German language level.

application_form.name: Application Form
application_form.notes: All fields must be filled in.

employment_status.name: Employment Status
employment_status.description: Documentation of current employment or job-seeking status.

income_proof.name: Income Proof
income_proof.description: Proof of income or financial support.
income_proof.notes: Last 3 months of payslips or benefit statements.

previous_course_certificate.name: Previous Course Certificate
previous_course_certificate.description: Certificate of any previous integration course attendance.

exemption_request.name: Exemption Request
exemption_request.description: Request for exemption from course fees.

employment_certificate.name: Employment Certificate
employment_certificate.description: Employment certificate from current employer showing employment status, working hours, and position.
employment_certificate.notes: Required if employed and seeking part-time or evening course.

social_benefits_notice.name: Social Benefits Notice (ALG II / Social Assistance)
social_benefits_notice.description: Current benefits notice from Jobcenter or Social Services showing benefit type and amount.

health_insurance_card.name: Health Insurance Card
health_insurance_card.notes: Both statutory and private health insurance accepted.

integration_course_application_form.name: Integration Course Application Form
integration_course_application_form.description: Completed BAMF application form for integration course admission (Form 630.007w).
integration_course_application_form.notes: All sections must be completed with signature.

previous_course_certificates.name: Previous Course Certificates
previous_course_certificates.description: Certificates from any previously attended German language or integration courses.
previous_course_certificates.notes: Must show course provider, hours attended, and completion status.

referral_letter.name: Referral/Obligation Letter
referral_letter.description: Official referral or obligation letter from immigration office or Jobcenter.
referral_letter.notes: Required only if obligated to attend per §44 AufenthG.

children_birth_certificates.name: Children's Birth Certificates
children_birth_certificates.description: Birth certificates of dependent children if relevant for childcare considerations.
children_birth_certificates.notes: Required for parent/women courses with childcare component.

childcare_proof.name: Childcare Proof
childcare_proof.description: Proof of childcare arrangements during course hours.

personal-data.name: Personal Data
personal-data.purpose: Identity verification and personal information documents for Ahmad Ali's integration course application.

certificates.name: Certificates
certificates.purpose: Educational and language certificates including diplomas, qualifications, and language proficiency documentation.

integration-docs.name: Integration Documents
integration-docs.purpose: Integration course specific documentation including enrollment, attendance, and course progress files.

applications.name: Applications & Forms
applications.purpose: Official application forms, BAMF submissions, and formal correspondence documents.

emails.name: Emails
emails.purpose: Email correspondence related to the integration course application and case processing.

evidence.name: Additional Evidence
evidence.purpose: Supporting documents and additional evidence required for the integration course application.

criteria.identity_verification: Verify identity through official government-issued documents
criteria.completeness_check: Ensure all required information is present
criteria.name_consistency: Full name must be consistent across all identity documents
criteria.valid_dates: All date fields must be valid and logically consistent
criteria.certified_translations: Afghan documents require certified German translations
criteria.nationality_verification: Verify Afghan nationality and refugee status documentation
criteria.cefr_level_verified: Language proficiency must be verified with CEFR level certificate
criteria.issuing_institution: Certificate must be from BAMF-recognized institution
criteria.test_date_validity: Test date must be within the accepted validity period
criteria.form_completeness: All required form fields must be properly filled
criteria.signature_verification: All signatures must be present and valid
criteria.fee_verification: Course fees or exemption documentation must be provided
criteria.recognized_institution: Language certificates must be from BAMF-recognized institutions
criteria.cefr_level_valid: Language certificates must clearly state CEFR level achieved
criteria.within_validity_period: Certificates should be current and valid
criteria.accredited_provider: Course documents must be from BAMF-accredited providers
criteria.minimum_hours: Attendance records must show sufficient course hours
criteria.all_required_fields: Application forms must have all mandatory fields completed
criteria.valid_signature: All forms must be properly signed by the applicant
criteria.official_sender: Verify communications are from official sources
criteria.relevant_to_case: Correspondence must relate to the applicant's case
criteria.relevant_to_application: Evidence must support the integration course application

Missing_certified_translation.suggestion: All non-German documents require certified translation by a sworn translator (beeidigter Übersetzer). Provide translator name, certification number, and stamp. Cost typically 10-50 EUR per page.

Expired_residence_permit.suggestion: Residence permit must be valid. If permit is expiring soon, advise applicant to apply for extension at Ausländerbehörde before integration course begins. Processing takes 4-8 weeks.

Incomplete_integration_course_applicatio.suggestion: All mandatory fields must be completed including personal details, contact information, course preferences, and signature. Use official BAMF form 630.007w available at www.bamf.de

Address_mismatch_between_documents.suggestion: Registration certificate address must match current residence. If recently moved, applicant needs new Meldebescheinigung from local Bürgeramt. Process takes 1-2 weeks.

Name_spelling_variations.suggestion: Different transliterations of non-Latin names are common. Document variations but ensure primary spelling matches official residence permit. Consider adding 'auch bekannt als' (also known as) note.

Unrecognized_language_certificate_issuer.suggestion: Only BAMF-recognized institutions accepted for integration course placement: Goethe-Institut, telc, TestDaF, ÖSD. Other certificates may not be accepted for placement assessment.

Previous_integration_course_discontinuat.suggestion: If applicant previously discontinued an integration course, documentation of reason required. Medical reasons need doctor's certificate. Personal reasons need explanation letter. May affect funding eligibility.

Missing_course_preference_indication.suggestion: Indicating preferred course type (intensive, part-time, evening) and location helps with faster placement in integration courses. Consider work schedule, childcare needs, and travel time.

Passport_expiring_during_course_period.suggestion: If passport expires during 6-12 month course period, advise renewal at embassy/consulate before course start. Integration course certificate (DTZ/LiD) requires valid ID at examination.

Missing_proof_for_cost_exemption.suggestion: To receive cost exemption (Kostenbeitragsbefreiung), must provide current benefits notice (ALG II, Sozialhilfe, AsylbLG). Standard fee is 2.29 EUR per teaching hour (total ~1600 EUR for 700-hour course).

Photo_does_not_meet_biometric_standards.issue: Photo does not meet biometric standards
Photo_does_not_meet_biometric_standards.suggestion: Biometric photo requirements: 35x45mm, taken within 6 months, neutral expression, white/light gray background, no sunglasses, facing forward. Photo booths at post offices, train stations, and photo studios provide compliant photos.

Registration_certificate_older_than_3_mo.suggestion: Meldebescheinigung must be current (issued within 3 months). Obtain new certificate from local Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt. Usually available same day or within 1 week.

Health_insurance_card_not_valid.suggestion: Health insurance coverage is mandatory for course enrollment. If card expired or invalid, contact health insurance provider (gesetzliche Krankenkasse) immediately for replacement. Cannot start course without valid insurance.

Wrong_residence_permit_type_for_entitlem.issue: Wrong residence permit type for entitlement
Wrong_residence_permit_type_for_entitlem.suggestion: Not all residence permit types grant automatic entitlement to integration course. Check §43 AufenthG eligibility. If not entitled, can still apply for admission per §44 AufenthG if places available.

Application_submitted_to_wrong_BAMF_regi.issue: Application submitted to wrong BAMF regional office
Application_submitted_to_wrong_BAMF_regi.suggestion: Applications must be submitted to BAMF regional office responsible for applicant's place of residence. Use BAMF-NAvI tool on www.bamf.de to find correct office. Wrong office will return application causing delays.

Missing_official_stamp_on_registration_c.issue: Missing official stamp on registration certificate
Missing_official_stamp_on_registration_c.suggestion: Meldebescheinigung must bear official stamp (Dienstsiegel) of issuing Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt. Simple address confirmation letters are not sufficient. Request official stamped certificate.

Course_obligation_deadline_passed.suggestion: If obligated to attend per §44 AufenthG, referral letter specifies enrollment deadline. Missing deadline can result in residence permit issues or benefit sanctions per §44a SGB II. Contact issuing authority immediately if deadline approaching.

Childcare_needs_not_addressed.suggestion: Parents with young children should inquire about Elternkurse (parent courses) or Frauenkurse (women's courses) that include childcare. Alternatively, arrange external childcare before course start to ensure regular attendance.

Literacy_level_unclear.suggestion: If applicant not literate in Latin script or native language, requires Alphabetisierungskurs (literacy course) per IntV §6. These courses have 1000 hours instead of standard 700. Provide education certificates to help assessment.

Special_accommodation_needs_not_document.suggestion: Applicants with disabilities, chronic illnesses, or special needs should provide medical certificate detailing required accommodations (wheelchair access, hearing loop, visual aids, extra time). Course providers can make arrangements if informed in advance.

Employment_schedule_conflicts_with_cours.issue: Employment schedule conflicts with course times
Employment_schedule_conflicts_with_cours.suggestion: Employed applicants should provide work schedule to find compatible course (part-time, evening, weekend). Some course providers offer flexible schedules. Discuss with employer possibility of paid educational leave (Bildungsurlaub).

Digital_application_issues_(online_porta.suggestion: If experiencing issues with online application portal, use paper form 630.007w and submit by mail to BAMF regional office. Include all required documents as certified copies. Keep proof of mailing (Einschreiben recommended).

Translator_credentials_missing_on_transl.suggestion: Certified translations must include: translator's full name, certification number, official stamp, signature, and date. Translation by friend/family member not accepted. Find sworn translators at local court (Landgericht) or via Bundesverband der Dolmetscher und Übersetzer (BDÜ).

Course_waiting_list_(no_immediate_placem.suggestion: High demand may result in waiting lists. Apply as early as possible. If obligated per §44 AufenthG, obligation is fulfilled by timely application. While waiting, consider voluntary German courses at Volkshochschule (VHS) or community organizations.

checkPoints.Current_level_A1_based_on_existing_certi: Current level: A1 (based on existing certificate)
